task_completion.description: Verify the scenario directory and necessary files are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal or file manager showing the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Solent STS Transfer Exercise/' containing files like environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini.

task_completion.description: Verify the environment.ini file is correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of environment.ini showing the location as Solent, time between 08:00 and 16:00, weather <= 1.5, and visibility >= 10.0.

task_completion.description: Verify the bc5.ini simulation settings are correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of bc5.ini showing max_radar_range=12, radar_range_resolution=256, full_radar=1, arpa_on=1, and view_angle=90.

task_completion.description: Verify the ownship.ini file is correctly configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of ownship.ini showing the vessel name 'MT Pacific Harmony', Latitude between 50.60 and 50.80, Longitude between -1.30 and -1.00, speed between 5.0 and 7.0 knots, and heading between 070 and 110.

task_completion.description: Verify the othership.ini file contains the required vessels and configurations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of othership.ini showing three vessels: 'MT Caspian Star', 'Svitzer Neptune' (astern), and 'STS Guard 1' (ahead). MT Caspian Star must have a heading within 10 degrees of ownship, speed within 1 knot of ownship, and be positioned 200m-800m abeam.

task_completion.description: Verify the STS operation briefing file is created with all required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/sts_operation_briefing.txt'. It must include a reference to 'OCIMF', an approach procedure, a safety checklist with at least 8 distinct items (e.g., fendering, mooring), and an emergency breakaway procedure.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created and saved the files in the correct directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent uses a text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) to save the files or uses redirection commands (like > or >>) to write to the actual file paths, rather than just printing text to the terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the briefing document contains realistic and meaningful content.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the safety checklist items and procedures are distinct, realistic maritime operations (e.g., checking fenders, communications), and not just generic placeholders like 'item 1, item 2'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually configured the scenario rather than copying an existing one.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent typing out or assembling the .ini file contents and briefing text, rather than executing a single pre-existing script or copying a completed scenario folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Scenario directory: /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Solent STS Transfer Exercise/
Briefing file: /home/ga/Documents/sts_operation_briefing.txt
Required vessels: MT Caspian Star, Svitzer Neptune, STS Guard 1
Ownship name: MT Pacific Harmony
OCIMF keyword: OCIMF
Min checklist items: 8
Lat range: 50.6 to 50.8
Long range: -1.3 to -1.0
Max heading diff: 10.0 degrees
Max speed diff: 1.0 knot
Min lateral dist: 200m
Max lateral dist: 800m
